content.text:
Line 70 in `tool_enforcement.rs` is a pattern-match arm (destructuring an incoming event), not a constructor. Line 92 is the actual construction. I have everything needed.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: The agent loop itself constructs and emits a `PolicyDenial` when its built-in policy check denies a tool call during a loop iteration (line 273).
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` (line 92) when it intercepts a `ToolCallRequested` event for a tool not in the allowlist — covering callers that bypass the loop's own check.

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` (line 92) when it intercepts a `ToolCallRequested` event for a tool not in the allowlist — covering callers that bypass the loop's own check.

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
